title: chore: allow gggff123 community publishing
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds GitHub user `gggff123` (`228371309`) to the community-model publisher allowlist.
- Keeps the change scoped to the existing static allowlist.
- Verified the branch is one commit ahead with a one-line diff.

Fixes #12634

gist.headline: One More Bee in the Garden
gist.blurb: gggff123 now has the key to the community-model garden. One small allowlist line, and another contributor can help pollenate the model shelf.
gist.summary: Added GitHub user gggff123 (ID 228371309) to the static community-model publisher allowlist so they can publish community models.
gist.impact: Community users gain another approved publisher, making it easier for gggff123's model contributions to reach the shared catalog.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polli welcoming a new community gardener into a cozy code-garden, with a tiny GitHub-style ID badge opening a gate to shelves of blooming model-seed packets. The scene represents a narrowly scoped publishing permission: one new trusted contributor joining the shared garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny gardener scarf as she opens a lime green (#ecf874) garden gate for a new contributor carrying a small GitHub ID badge; code-plants and model-seed packets bloom on nearby shelves. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley, with subtle pixel-font text: 'PUBLISHER OK'.
